variants.title: Filtrec FB130B5C10 Breather Filter
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec FB130B5C10. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the FB130B5C10 provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.

Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.

variants.title: HiFi Filter FS 222 Breather Filter | Replaces the Filtrec FB130B5C10
variants.option1Value: HiFi Filter FS 222 Breather Filter | Replaces the Filtrec FB130B5C10
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter FS 222 Breather Filter. This breather filter plays a vital role in protecting hydraulic reservoirs, gearboxes, and storage tanks by filtering air before it enters the system. It prevents airborne contaminants like dust, dirt, and moisture from compromising fluid quality, helping safeguard internal components and reducing the risk of wear and system failures. With durable construction and high-efficiency filtration media, it delivers long-lasting performance even in demanding environments. Proper pressure balance is maintained while keeping fluids clean, ultimately extending the lifespan and reliability of hydraulic and lubrication systems.
specifications: Style: BREATHER FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 120.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 90.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 40.0 mm, Thread 1 (D7): 1"-BSP, Height 1 (H1): 107.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 80.0 mm
